name: claude-bridge
description: Two-way Q&A between separate Claude Code sessions: ask_peer the other project and get answers read from its real source. No API key.

partner_port.title: Partner port
partner_port.description: The port the partner peer's relay/answer daemon listens on (the peer you ask). Required — there is no default.

relay_port.title: Your relay port (optional, for in-chat answering)
relay_port.description: If you run a `claude-bridge relay` inbox so you answer the partner's questions in your own chat, set its port here to get the incoming_questions / answer_incoming tools. Leave empty for ask-only.

name.title: This peer's name
name.description: Label for this side, e.g. backend.

partner_name.title: Partner's name
partner_name.description: Label for the peer you talk to, e.g. frontend.
